_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Enabling and informing risk-based decisions involves acting as a point of escalation; being trusted by senior risk owners as an expert in security; apply risk methodologies at the most complex levels of risk.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including policy development, role and responsibility definition, escalation protocols, exception management, and board-level model risk reporting.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI RM domain. RM-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-S-008 (RM, cosine: 0.554), DG-K-002 (DG, cosine: 0.541).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.554). Shared vocabulary: [escalation, risk]. DDaT-only terms [acting, apply, based, complex, decisions, enabling] vs WIDAI-only terms [board, definition, designing, development, exception, framework] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.866, R=0.866). Balanced P/R — the 33-word DDaT element and 26-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.2%). "Enabling and informing risk-based decisions involves acting as a point of escala" and "Skill in designing and maintaining a model risk governance framework, including" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.587 ≈ STS 0.554 (gap 0.032). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [escalation, risk] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.6%. Shared tokens: [escalation, risk]. DDaT-only: [acting, apply, based, complex, decisions, enabling]. WIDAI-only: [board, definition, designing, development, exception, framework].
